label: turboquant
status: serves, but impractically slow on this stack
note: 3-bit weights + 4-bit KV cache. Only the PyTorch reference compression path runs (per-token Python compression on every decode step); the fused CUDA kernel path is blocked here by a 'bit_width must be 1-4' constraint (default boundary layers use 8-bit K). The full benchmark.py suite was not run because generation is ~0.1 tok/s (multi_turn alone would take ~2.5 h).

results._source: vLLM engine 'Avg generation throughput' logs, Running: 1 req
